task_completion.description: Open the raw patent draft in Apache OpenOffice Writer
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Apache OpenOffice Writer application is open and displays the unformatted text of the patent draft.

task_completion.description: Set all page margins to 1.00 inch
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Page Style' dialog shows Top, Bottom, Left, and Right margins set to 1.00 inch (or 2.54 cm), or the horizontal and vertical rulers visually indicate 1-inch margins.

task_completion.description: Apply 12pt Times New Roman or Arial font and double line spacing
task_completion.visual_evidence: The formatting toolbar shows the font set to 'Times New Roman' or 'Arial' and size '12'. The main body text is visibly double-spaced (large gaps between lines).

task_completion.description: Enable line numbering in the left margin
task_completion.visual_evidence: Sequential numbers (1, 2, 3...) appear in the left margin alongside the document's text lines.

task_completion.description: Format section headings as bold and all caps
task_completion.visual_evidence: Section headings (e.g., BACKGROUND, SUMMARY, CLAIMS, ABSTRACT) are capitalized and have a bold weight applied.

task_completion.description: Format the Claims section as a numbered list
task_completion.visual_evidence: The items under the CLAIMS section are formatted as a numbered list (1., 2., 3., etc.) using the list tool, indicated by proper indentation.

task_completion.description: Start the Abstract on a new page
task_completion.visual_evidence: A page break is visible before the ABSTRACT section, placing the heading 'ABSTRACT' at the very top of a new page.
The OpenOffice Writer title bar displays 'NeuroSync_Patent_App.odt', or the 'Save As' dialog shows the file being saved with this exact name in the /home/ga/Documents/ directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the Apache OpenOffice Writer GUI to format the document
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with OpenOffice Writer menus, toolbars, and dialog boxes (like Page Style, Paragraph, or Line Numbering) rather than terminal commands.

integrity.description: The document contains the correct patent text
integrity.visual_evidence: The text in the document matches the 'Adaptive Haptic Feedback Controller' invention (Title: SYSTEM AND METHOD FOR ADAPTIVE HAPTIC FEEDBACK IN VIRTUAL ENVIRONMENTS) and was not replaced with dummy text.

integrity.description: The file was saved properly through the application
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent used the 'File > Save As' dialog in OpenOffice to create the .odt file, rather than just renaming a .txt file in the terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The output file must be saved as '/home/ga/Documents/NeuroSync_Patent_App.odt'. Formatting requirements: exactly 1.00 inch (2.54 cm) margins on all sides, 12pt Times New Roman or Arial font, Double (2.0 or 200%) line spacing, line numbering enabled in the left margin, bold and ALL CAPS section headings, a numbered list for the Claims section, and the Abstract must start on a new page. The document title is 'SYSTEM AND METHOD FOR ADAPTIVE HAPTIC FEEDBACK IN VIRTUAL ENVIRONMENTS'.
